playlist_strategy: A high-octane progression designed to mirror An intense workout, starting with an aggressive warmup, escalating through heavy lifting phases, and peaking into explosive cardio/PR tracks.

tracks.title: Iron Awakening
tracks.youtube_title: WAKE UP MOTIVATION | Aggressive Gym Phonk
tracks.listening_scenario: Pre-workout scoop kicking in, walking into the gym.
tracks.style_prompt: Aggressive drift phonk, heavy distorted 808 bass, dark atmospheric pads, rhythmic cowbell melodies, gritty lofi texture, pumping sidechain, intense workout energy
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic shot of a muscular figure in a dark, grimy underground gym putting on headphones, dramatic red rim lighting, smoke on the floor, ultra detailed, hyper-realistic, 8k resolution
tracks.youtube_description:
Start your workout right. Aggressive gym phonk to get you in the zone before hitting the iron. 

#phonk #gymmotivation #workoutmusic

tracks.title: Titan Grip
tracks.youtube_title: HEAVY WEIGHTS | Dark Trap Workout Mix
tracks.listening_scenario: Loading up the bar for the first heavy compound movement.
tracks.style_prompt: Dark orchestral trap, massive brass hits, fast hi-hat rolls, deep booming sub bass, cinematic tension, aggressive hip-hop beats, menacing atmosphere
tracks.image_prompt: A heavily chalked hand gripping an Olympic barbell loaded with massive iron plates, dramatic overhead lighting casting deep shadows, sweat drops flying, intense sports photography
tracks.youtube_description:
Dark trap beats designed for heavy lifting. Get your mind right and lift heavy. 

#darktrap #lifting #gymmusic

tracks.title: Adrenaline Override
tracks.listening_scenario: Pushing past failure on a tough set.
tracks.style_prompt: Euphoric hardstyle, aggressive distorted kick drums, huge supersaw synth leads, cinematic buildup, massive energetic drops, rave atmosphere, 150 BPM
tracks.image_prompt: Silhouette of a muscular athlete screaming in triumph after a heavy deadlift, neon green glowing lights behind them, sparks in the background, epic action poster style
tracks.youtube_description:
Pure hardstyle energy to help you push past your limits. When you feel like quitting, play this. 

#hardstyle #gym #zyzz

tracks.title: Trench Warfare
tracks.youtube_title: BEAST MODE ACTIVATED | Midtempo Bass / Cyberpunk
tracks.listening_scenario: Grinding through a high-volume accessory workout block.
tracks.style_prompt: Aggressive midtempo bass, cyberpunk aesthetic, gritty distorted reese bass, industrial sound design, punchy heavy drums, futuristic dark synthwave elements, 105 BPM
tracks.image_prompt: A futuristic underground gym in a cyberpunk city, neon purple and cyan lights, a cyborg athlete lifting heavy hexagonal dumbells, highly detailed metallic textures, digital art
tracks.youtube_description:
Heavy industrial midtempo bass for that focused, mechanical grind. Become a machine. 

#cyberpunk #midtempo #workout

tracks.title: Blood and Iron
tracks.youtube_title: DESTROY YOUR WORKOUT | Heavy Metalstep Music
tracks.listening_scenario: Maxing out on squats or bench press.
tracks.style_prompt: Heavy metalstep, angry electric guitar riffs blending into massive dubstep bass drops, double kick drums, screaming synth sound design, aggressive and violent energy
tracks.image_prompt: A fierce powerlifter at the bottom of a massive squat, chains hanging from the bar, intense facial expression, blood red lighting, gritty heavily contrasted photography
tracks.youtube_description:
Metal and Dubstep collide to create the ultimate PR song. Time to break records. 

#metalstep #dubstep #powerlifting

tracks.title: No Witnesses
tracks.youtube_title: Villain Arc 🦹🏻‍♂️ Aggressive Gym Hip Hop/Rap
tracks.listening_scenario: Cardio sprints or intense HIIT circuit.
tracks.style_prompt: Epic hardcore trap beat, massive gothic choir samples, frantic hi-hat patterns, booming distorted 808s, dark dramatic tubular bells, fast paced, villain arc energy
tracks.image_prompt: A lone athlete running on a treadmill in a completely dark room illuminated only by a spotlight, wearing a black hoodie with gold chains, moody cinematic lighting
tracks.youtube_description:
Embrace the villain arc. Dark, fast-paced trap to keep you moving faster than your demons. 

#villainarc #trapworkout #gymrap

tracks.title: Heart Rate 200
tracks.youtube_title: INSANE PUMP | Drum & Bass Workout Music
tracks.listening_scenario: Chasing the pump with fast, continuous reps.
tracks.style_prompt: Neurofunk Drum and Bass, hyper-fast 174 BPM breakbeats, complex gnarly reese basslines, futuristic techy synth lasers, relentless driving energy, dark underground rave vibe
tracks.image_prompt: Abstract representation of a heartbeat monitor spiking wildly in glowing acid green lines over a dark grimy background with motion blur to convey extreme speed
tracks.youtube_description:
Keep the pace up with high-BPM Neurofunk Drum & Bass. Perfect for running or achieving a massive pump. 

#dnb #neurofunk #runningmusic

tracks.title: God of War
tracks.youtube_title: EPIC ORCHESTRAL WORKOUT | Become a Spartan
tracks.energy_curve: Slow epic buildup to monumental climax
tracks.listening_scenario: Preparing mentally for the final, heaviest set of the day.
tracks.style_prompt: Epic cinematic trailer music, massive pounding taiko drums, sweeping aggressive string sections, heroic blazing french horns, huge dramatic choir crescendos, triumphant and empowering
tracks.image_prompt: A modern bodybuilder standing like a Greek statue in a ruined colosseum, dust in the air, golden hour sunlight slicing through the clouds, heroic fantasy art style
tracks.youtube_description:
Summon your inner Spartan. Epic orchestral music to fuel your final sets. Defeat the weights. 

#epicmusic #spartan #gymmotivation

tracks.title: Demon Back
tracks.listening_scenario: Hitting the posing room or doing back/bicep isolation work.
tracks.target_audience: Gen Z gym goers, TikTok fitness community
tracks.style_prompt: Aggressive Brazilian Phonk, fast funk carioca drum rhythms, huge distorted bass, repetitive rhythmic cowbells, intense phonk aesthetic, TikTok gym trend style, extremely bouncy
tracks.image_prompt: View from behind of an extraordinarily muscular back with deep striations ('demon back'), dark dramatic lighting highlighting the muscle definition, gritty gym aesthetic
tracks.youtube_description:
You know what time it is. Brazilian phonk to get that demon back pump. 

#brazilianphonk #gymtok #demonback

tracks.title: Through the Pain
tracks.youtube_title: FINISH STRONG | Melodic Dubstep / Chillstep Workout
tracks.listening_scenario: Cooling down, stretching, and reflecting on a successful workout.
tracks.style_prompt: Emotional melodic dubstep, beautiful acoustic piano intro, breaking into huge euphoric supersaw chord drops, pitched vocal chops, heavy but uplifting half-time drums
tracks.image_prompt: An empty gym bathed in early morning sunlight coming through large windows, a single towel draped over a bench, peaceful, triumphant, high quality architectural rendering
tracks.youtube_description:
You did it. Time to cool down, stretch, and recover. Melodic dubstep for the post-workout endorphin rush. 

#melodicdubstep #cooldown #gymrecovery
